Help.description: Shows a list of usable commands, or gives a detailed description of a command.

Loop.description: Loops a command. Delete the original message to terminate the loop if necessary. Subject to regular command restrictions and rate limits.

iterations.description: Amount of times to perform target command

Edit.description: Edits an existing bot message using new output from a command. Subject to regular command restrictions and rate limits.

target.description: Target message; must be visible to the bot, and must use full message links if older than 2 weeks.

Pipe.description: Redirects the output of one command into another. Subject to regular command restrictions and rate limits.

Icon.description: Sends a link to the avatar of a user or server.

Info.description: Shows information about the target user, channel, role or server.

objects.description: Target object to retrieve info about

mode.description: Default target if no other input specified

Top.description: Ranks the users in the current server by total messages sent

amount.description: Maximum amount of users to display

Profile.description: Shows or edits a user profile on Miza.

user.description: Target user to retrieve profile from

description.description: Profile description. Will show up in embeds
description.example: You should play Cave Story, it's a good game

website.description: Optional field denoting a redirect when the profile is clicked on

icon.description: Thumbnail to display on corner of embeds

timezone.description: Timezone. Used in datetime calculations where applicable; supports both city/state names (e.g. "London") and abbreviations (e.g. "AET"). Daylight savings is automatically calculated for non-fixed timezones

birthday.description: Birthday date; affected by the timezone parameter

optout.description: Whether to opt-out of automated services, excluding moderation features

Status.description: Shows the bot's current internal program state.

Invite.description: Sends a link to Miza's homepage, github and invite code, as well as an invite link to the current server if applicable.

Preserve.description: Sends a reverse proxy link to preserve a Discord attachment URL, or sends a link to Miza's webserver's upload page: https://mizabot.xyz/files

minimise.description: Whether to produce the shortest possible alias

Reminder.description: Sets a reminder for a certain date and time in the future.

mode.description: Reminders are sent as direct messages, announcements are sent to the origin channel, urgent reminders will continuously update a direct message until the acknowledged by a reaction

message.description: Message to receive. Will show up as an embed

icon.description: Thumbnail to display on corner of embed

time.example: 35 mins and 6.25 secs before 3am next tuesday, EDT

every.description: Turn the reminder into a recurring one that will resend itself after a given amount of time. Note: Must be removed manually!

Note.description: Takes note of a given string and allows you to view and edit a to-do list!

message.description: Message to receive. Will show up as an embed

query.description: Input expression or formula, in Sympy syntax

precision.description: Floating point calculation precision. Also affects accuracy of scientific notation and recurring decimals

rationalise.description: Whether to simplify/rationalise results where possible.

Unicode.description: Converts unicode text to hexadecimal or binary numbers.
example: uni2bin this is a secret message

ID2Time.description: Converts a discord ID to its corresponding UTC time.

time.example: 35 minutes and 6.25 seconds before 3am next tuesday, EDT

Fancy.description: Creates fun string translations using unicode fonts.

UnFancy.description: Removes unicode formatting and diacritic characters from inputted text.

OwOify.description: Applies the owo/uwu text filter to a string.
example: owoify -a Greetings, this is your cat god speaking

AltCaps.description: Alternates the capitalization on characters in a string.

Obfuscate.description: Obfuscates English text by substituting identical look-alikes with a unicode table.

Invisicode.description: Encodes arbitrary text or data in the invisicode format. See https://github.com/thomas-xin/invisicode for more info, or to run it yourself!

url.description: File to encode or decode

Char2Emoji.description: Makes emoji blocks using a string.

Emoticon.description: Sends an ASCII emoticon from a selection.

Time.description: Shows the current time at a certain GMT/UTC offset, or the current time for a user.

user.description: Target user to retrieve timezone from. Will use automatically estimated timezone if not provided

estimate.description: Force a timezone estimate, even if a timezone is assigned

timezone.description: Target timezone to display input after conversion

Identify.description: Detects the type, mime, and optionally details of an input file.

Follow.description: Follows a discord message link and/or finds URLs in a string.

urls.description: Text containing one or more URLs to search

Match.description: matches two strings using Linux-style RegExp, or computes the match ratio of two strings.

Random.description: Randomly chooses from a list of words.

args.description: List of possible choices, separated by newline or space.

Rate.description: Rates a given object with a random value out of 10!

WordCount.description: Simple command that returns the word and character count of a supplied message. message.txt files work too!

BubbleWrap.description: Creates a sheet of bubble wrap using spoilers.

Urban.description: Searches Urban Dictionary for an item.

Browse.description: Searches the web, and displays as text or image.

mode.description: Controls how direct URLs are visited; produces an image by default

query.description: Search query; may be a string or URL

Perms.description: Shows or changes a user's permission level. Server Administrators bypass this.

Timeout.description: Times out one or more users for a certain amount of time.

duration.example: 35 mins and 6.25 secs before 3am next tuesday, EDT

reason.description: Timeout reason (will show up in Audit Log)

Purge.description: Deletes a number or range of messages from a certain user in current channel.

count.description: Maximum amount of messages to delete. Does NOT include the message invoking the command.

range.description: Range of message IDs to delete

Ban.description: Bans a user for a certain amount of time, with an optional reason.

RoleSelect.description: Creates a message that allows users to self-assign roles from a specified list.

limit.description: Amount of roles each user can assign

description.default: Click a button to add or remove a role from yourself!

Verifier.description: Sends a verification trigger in the current channel, intended to filter out bots.

difficulty.description: Number of characters required to transcribe

RoleGiver.description: Adds an automated role giver to the current channel. Triggered by a keyword in messages, only applicable to users with permission level >= 0 and account age >= 7d. Searches for word if only word characters, any substring if non-word characters are included, or regex if trigger begins and ends with a slash (/).

AutoRole.description: Causes any new user joining the server to automatically gain the targeted role. Input multiple roles to create a randomized role giver.

RolePreserver.description: Causes Miza to save roles for all users, and re-add them when they leave and rejoin.

NickPreserver.description: Causes Miza to save nicknames for all users, and re-add them when they leave and rejoin.

ThreadPreserver.description: Causes Miza to "bump" (revive) the current thread when auto-archived.

Lockdown.description: Completely locks down the server by removing send message permissions for all users, revoking all invites, and archiving all threads.

Archive.description: Archives all messages, attachments and users into a .zip folder. Defaults to entire server if no channel specified, requires server permission level 3 as well as a Lv2 or above Miza subscription to perform, and may take a significant amount of time.

UserLog.description: Causes Miza to log user and member events from the server, in the current channel.

MessageLog.description: Causes Miza to log message and file events from the server, in the current channel.

StarBoard.description: Causes Miza to repost popular messages with a certain number of a specified reaction anywhere from the server, into the current channel.

emoji.description: Emoji to treat as starboard trigger.

count.description: Amount of reactions required to trigger. Counts both regular and super reactions

channel.description: Channel to add or remove from ignore list; will not forward messages from channels within this list

Crosspost.description: Causes Miza to automatically crosspost all messages from the target channel, into the current channel.

Publish.description: Causes Miza to automatically publish all posted messages in the current channel.

EnabledCommands.description: Shows, enables, or disables a command category in the current channel.

apply_all.description: Whether to apply to server (will affect all non-assigned channels)

target.description: Target channel (specifying the server's ID will act the same way as --enable-all/--disable-all)

Prefix.description: Shows or changes the prefix for Miza's commands for this server.

CreateEmoji.description: Creates a custom emoji from a URL or attached file.

url.description: The image to use (will automatically be resized to <256kb if larger)

CreateSound.description: Creates a custom soundboard from a URL or attached file. Can handle up to 10 seconds of sound, as opposed to the default 5.2s limit

url.description: The audio to use (will automatically be cut to <10s if longer)

CreateSticker.description: Creates a custom sticker from a URL or attached file.

url.description: The image to use (will automatically be resized to <256kb if larger)

ScanEmoji.description: Scans all the emojis in the current server for potential issues.

ThreadList.description: Shows or revives all threads in the current server.

Queue.description: Shows the music queue, or plays a song in voice.

mode.description: Determines which song(s) to add if the link resolves to a playlist

start.description: start position; automatically seeks when played

end.description: end position; subsequent audio skipped automatically

Connect.description: Summons the bot into a voice channel, or advises it to leave.

channel.description: Target channel to join (defaults to voice channel of closest proximity)

Skip.description: Removes an entry or range of entries from the voice channel queue.

mode.description: Skip mode; force skips voting and bypasses repeats, but requires trusted priviledge level for other users' songs

slices.description: Entry or sequence of entries to remove; accepts one or more slice indicators such as 1..100 or 6:73:4

after.description: Skips the song(s) after the provided timestamp rather than immediately; requires trusted priviledge level for other users' songs

AudioState.description: Adjusts boolean states of the audio player

AudioSettings.description: Adjusts variable settings of the audio player

value.description: Specify a value; all settings except bitrate are represented using percentages; enter "DEFAULT" to reset

Dump.description: Saves or loads the currently playing audio, including queue and settings, as a re-usable checkpoint file.

mode.description: Whether to save or load queue, or append loaded data to current queue

url.description: Queue data to load

Seek.description: Seeks to a position in the current audio file.

Jump.description: Rotates the queue to the left by a certain amount of steps.

Shuffle.description: Immediately shuffles the queue. See ~autoshuffle for an automatic, non-disruptive version

Dedup.description: Removes all duplicate elements from the queue.

UnmuteAll.description: Disables server mute/deafen for all members.

VoiceNuke.description: Removes all users from voice channels in the current server.

RefreshRegion.description: Changes the current voice channel's region, always forcing a refresh.

Radio.description: Searches for a radio station livestream on https://api.radio-browser.info that can be played in voice.

Lyrics.description: Searches genius.com for lyrics of a song.

Download.description: Searches and/or downloads a song from a YouTube/SoundCloud query or stream link.

url.description: The URL of a song or playlist to download.

format.description: Output format of the downloaded file.

query.description: A search query to look for a song or video.

start.description: The start time to trim the file at.

end.description: The end time to trim the file at.

Hyperchoron.description: Runs Hyperchoron on the input URL. See https://github.com/thomas-xin/hyperchoron for more info, or to run it yourself!

url.description: Audio supplied by URL or attachment

ColourDeficiency.description: Applies a colourblindness filter to the target image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

EdgeDetect.description: Applies an edge or depth detection algorithm to the image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Blur.description: Applies a blur algorithm to the image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

ColourSpace.description: Changes the colour space of the supplied image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

source.description: The colourspace which should be treated as the image's original space

dest.description: The colourspace which should be treated as the image's new space

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

GMagik.description: Applies the Magik image filter to supplied image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

intensity.description: Distortion distance, relative to cell size

cells.description: How many transform cells should tile each edge of the image

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Gradient.description: Generates a gradient with a specific shape.

mode.description: Indicates the type of spiral to generate

colour.description: The colour of the gradient on one side

background.description: The colour of the gradient on the other side

repetitions.description: How many times the gradient repeats across the image

colourspace.description: The colourspace used to produce the image

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Colour.description: Creates a 128x128 image filled with the target colour.

colour.description: The colour of the gradient on one side

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Text.description: Renders text using an optional font.

accepts.gill sans mt ext condensed bold: Gill Sans MT Ext Condensed Bold
accepts.tw cen mt condensed extra bold: Tw Cen MT Condensed Extra Bold

size.description: The size of the font (usually in pixels width/height)

colour.description: The colour of the gradient on one side

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Average.description: Computes the average pixel colour in RGB for the supplied image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

QR.description: Creates a QR code image from an input string, optionally adding a rainbow swirl effect.

mode.description: Indicates whether to apply an animated rainbow filter to the output

arms.description: Number of spiral arms, for rainbow mode

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Rainbow.description: Creates an animation from repeatedly hueshifting supplied image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

mode.description: The colour space to perform hueshifts in. Changes the way chroma/saturation is treated

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Scroll.description: Creates an animation from repeatedly shifting supplied image in a specified direction.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Spin.description: Creates an animation from repeatedly rotating supplied image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

angle.description: Initial orientation of the image, in counterclockwise degrees

circle.description: Indicates whether to crop the image to a circle

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Orbit.description: Renders a ring of orbiting sprites of the supplied image.

urls.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

count.description: The amount of each image to include in the ring

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Pet.description: Creates an animation from applying the Petpet generator to the supplied image.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Tesseract.description: Creates an animation from applying the image as a tesseract texture and rotating.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

speed.description: Inverse of duration; higher values reduce the duration

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Resize.description: Changes size of supplied image, using an optional scaling operation.

urls.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

resolution.description: Width and height of output, in pixels

multiplier.description: Multiplies width and height by a constant factor

area.description: Desired area in square pixels; will automatically scale current aspect ratio

duration.description: The duration of the animation (auto-syncs if the input is animated, negative values reverse the animation)

fps.description: The framerate of the animation (does not affect duration)

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Crop.description: Crops the supplied image to a given size, expanding if necessary. Use "-" to omit measurements.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

left.description: Left edge of crop in pixels, absolute

top.description: Top edge of crop in pixels, absolute

right.description: Right edge of crop in pixels, absolute

bottom.description: Bottom edge of crop in pixels, absolute

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Adjust.description: Adjusts an optional amount of channels in the target image with a given operation and optional value.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

clip.description: Clips out-of-bound values. Wraps values if not set

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Cut2Loop.description: Autodetects an appropriate loop position for an animation lasting more than one full loop, and performs a trim.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

ImageCompare.description: Compares the similarity (Peak Signal-Noise Ratio) between two images. A value of 40 or higher means visual match.

urls.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

Caption.description: Renders text onto an image or animation, using an optional font.

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

accepts.gill sans mt ext condensed bold: Gill Sans MT Ext Condensed Bold
accepts.tw cen mt condensed extra bold: Tw Cen MT Condensed Extra Bold

size.description: The size of the font (usually in pixels width/height)

colour.description: The colour of the gradient on one side

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Blend.description: Combines the two supplied images, using an optional blend operation.

urls.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Text2048.description: Plays a game of 2048 using buttons. Gained points are rewarded as gold.

public.description: Whether the game is playable by other users

insanity.description: Whether to scale spawns based on current progress

Snake.description: Plays a game of Snake using buttons!

SlotMachine.description: Plays a slot machine game. Costs gold to play, can yield gold and diamonds.

Barter.description: Simulates a Minecraft Piglin barter. Uses gold ingots; see ~shop and ~bal for more!

Uno.description: Play a game of UNO with me, or with friends!

Matchmaking.description: Ships two provided objects with a randomised percent.

Pay.description: Pays a specified amount of coins or diamonds to the target user.

React.description: Causes Miza to automatically assign a reaction to messages containing the trigger. Triggered by a keyword in messages, only applicable to non-command messages.

keyword.description: Keyword(s) to search. Uses words if only word characters, any substring if non-word characters are included, or regex if trigger begins and ends with a slash (/)

emoji.description: Emoji to add as reaction. Use `--remove --emoji` to remove by emoji rather than keyword

preprocess.description: Preprocess the message, allowing customisation of rules based on USERNAME, NICKNAME, CONTENT and ID; for example, to replicate the conditions for sparkle react, use `--preprocess "{ID}"` and `--keyword "/0{3}$/"`

Dogpile.description: Causes Miza to automatically imitate users when 3+ of the same messages are posted in a row. Grants XP and gold when triggered. Enabled by default.

DadJoke.description: Causes Miza to automatically call-out or nickname a user whenever they say "I am <something>" or some variant.

chance.description: Chance for occurence in %. Shared between all actions that have equal odds

Daily.description: Shows your list of daily quests.

Stats.description: Shows the target users' stats, and their wallet and premium subscription status (if applicable).

logging.description: Controls how frequently premium quota usage is logged after commands; "none" disables all logging, "auto" will log at powers of 3 or increments of $1, and "all" will log all usage and associated costs

Cat.description: Pulls a random image from thecatapi.com, api.alexflipnote.dev/cats, or cdn.nekos.life/meow, and embeds it. Be sure to check out https://mizabot.xyz/cats!

embed.description: Whether to send the message as an embed

code.description: HTTP status code to display an image from https://http.cat

Dog.description: Pulls a random image from images.dog.ceo, api.alexflipnote.dev/dogs, or cdn.nekos.life/woof, and embeds it. Be sure to check out https://mizabot.xyz/dogs!

embed.description: Whether to send the message as an embed

8Ball.description: Pulls a random image from cdn.nekos.life/8ball, and embeds it.

embed.description: Whether to send the message as an embed

XKCD.description: Pulls a random image from xkcd.com and embeds it.

embed.description: Whether to send the message as an embed

Turnoff.description: Pulls a random image from turnoff.us and embeds it.

embed.description: Whether to send the message as an embed

Inspiro.description: Pulls a random image from inspirobot.me and embeds it.

embed.description: Whether to send the message as an embed

GIFSearch.description: Searches for animations on giphy, tenor and klipy.

count.description: Amount of results to display, split between 50% klipy, 25% tenor and 25% giphy

Translate.description: Translates text from one language to another.

Translator.description: Adds an automated translator to the current channel. Specify a list of languages to translate between, and optionally a translation engine. All non-command messages that do not begin with "#", "%" or "//" will be passed through the translator.

disable.description: Turns off translator for the current channel

Ask.description: Ask me any question, and I'll answer it. Mentioning me also serves as an alias to this command, but only if no other command is specified. The chatbot will automatically choose one of multiple language models to conjure a response based on premium level. Less censorship is imposed when invoked within NSFW channels.

prompt.example: Can I please have a hug?

model.description: Model size hint. Larger size increases intelligence, at the cost of higher quota usage

ChatConfig.description: Customises my personality and behaviours for ~ask and @mentions in the current channel. Note that with the increased complexity of the chatbot, a clear description of who the bot is should be provided. If used in DMs, applies per-user settings that will override settings in servers, except tts and history.

description.example: Your name is Miza, you are dry, sarcastic and snarky. Be creative with your responses and attempt to annoy the user.

model.description: Model size hint. Larger size increases intelligence, at the cost of higher quota usage

stream.description: Determines whether the response should be edited, or delayed until complete, default true

tts.description: Whether the output should include automatic text-to-speech audio. "discord" mode uses Discord's builtin TTS feature, while "builtin" mode will play the output in the voice channel when available

history.description: Whether chat history is enabled, and if so, whether the conversation is shared (including messages from different users)

apply_all.description: Whether to apply to all channels (only applicable in servers)

Instruct.description: Similar to ~ask, but functions as instruct rather than chat.

prompt.example: Once upon a time, there was

api.description: Custom OpenAI-compatible API url, optionally followed by API key and then model, all separated with "#"

frequency_penalty.description: Amount to penalise tokens based on frequency

presence_penalty.description: Amount to penalise tokens based on presence

url.description: Image, animation or video, supplied by URL or attachment

OCR.description: Attempts to read text in an image using Optical Character Recognition AI.

url.description: Image supplied by URL or attachment

AudioSeparator.description: Runs Audio-Separator on the input URL. See https://github.com/nomadkaraoke/python-audio-separator for more info, or to run it yourself!

url.description: Audio supplied by URL or attachment

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

Vectorise.description: Applies https://replicate.com/recraft-ai/recraft-vectorize/api to convert a raster image to SVG format.

url.description: Image supplied by URL or attachment

TTS.description: Produces synthesised speech from a text input.

voice.description: The engine and voice to apply

format.description: The file format or codec of the output

autoplay.description: Automatically plays in the current voice channel

Verify.description: Verifies your account age as 18+, allowing you to access NSFW-restricted commands within DM channels.

mode.description: Determines whether to enable, disable, or view verification status

CS_mem2flag.description: Returns a sequence of Cave Story TSC commands to set a certain memory address to a certain value.

CS_flag2mem.description: Returns the memory offset and specific bit pointed to by a given flag number.

CS_num2val.description: Returns a TSC value representing the desired number, within a certain number of characters.

CS_val2num.description: Returns the number encoded by a given TSC value.

CS_hex2xml.description: Converts a given Cave Story hex patch to an xml file readable by Booster's Lab.

CSsearch.description: Searches the Cave Story NPC list for an NPC/bullet/effect/music/variable by ID, name or description.

Wav2Png.description: Runs wav2png on the input URL. See https://github.com/thomas-xin/audioptic for more info, or to run it yourself!

url.description: Image, animation, video or audio, supplied by URL or attachment

fmt.description: The file format or codec of the output

SpectralPulse.description: Runs SpectralPulse on the input URL. Operates on a global queue system. See https://github.com/thomas-xin/SpectralPulse for more info, or to run it yourself!

BTD6Paragon.description: Given a tower and provided parameters, generates a list of Bloons TD 6 optimised paragon sacrifices. Parameters are "p" for pops, "g" for cash generated, "t" for Geraldo totems, and "l" for additional tower limit.

SkyShardReminder.description: Tracks and sends DM reminders for Shard Eruptions in the game Sky: Children of the Light. Referenced code from https://github.com/PlutoyDev/sky-shards. When active, reminders will be sent 12 hours prior to the first landing, and additionally 1 hour, 5 minutes, and at the start of all landings.

mode.description: Whether to disable reminders, or to target a particular type of shard

ping.description: Whether to ping at all intervals by default

Restart.description: Restarts, reloads, or shuts down Miza, with an optional delay.

mode.description: Image supplied by URL or attachment

Execute.description: Executes a command as other user(s), similar to the command's function in Minecraft.

Exec.description: Causes all messages by the bot owner(s) in the current channel to be executed as python code on Miza.

code.description: Code to evaluate directly in the main process

audio.description: Code to evaluate directly in the audio process

server.description: Code to evaluate directly in the server process

url.description: The new image to use as avatar

Maintenance.description: Toggles Maintenance mode, which will block all use of commands for all servers except the current one while active.

Suspend.description: Prevents a user from accessing Miza's commands. Overrides <perms>.
